overall.description: A third-person survival horror game scene depicting a character in a green jacket exploring a heavily fogged abandoned town. The character walks from a deserted residential street down to a lakeside shoreline, with thick atmospheric fog obscuring visibility and creating an ominous, tense atmosphere typical of the Silent Hill series.

scene_state.functional_zone: abandoned residential street in heavy fog

agents.ego_description: walking steadily down the center of the foggy deserted street, passing abandoned houses and trees

entered.detail: two-story brick building with broken windows and weathered facade
dilapidated wooden house with front porch and peeling paint
deciduous tree with sparse foliage emerging from the fog
rain-soaked asphalt road with double yellow lines

segments.scene_description: The character walks along a fog-shrouded abandoned street lined with derelict wooden houses and brick buildings. The wet asphalt reflects the diffused light as the character moves past sparse trees, with visibility limited to a few meters by the dense fog.

events.description: paved road ends at foggy lake shoreline, transitioning to rocky dirt path along water's edge
abandoned wooden buildings emerge through the dense fog on the right side of the shore

agents.ego_description: walking carefully along the foggy lakeshore, approaching the water's edge while observing the abandoned structures

entered.detail: still lake water barely visible through the thick fog, reflecting the gray sky
uneven rocky and dirt shoreline replacing the paved road
weathered two-story wooden house with balcony visible through the fog

segments.scene_description: The scene transitions from street to lakeside as the character walks along the foggy shoreline. The ground becomes rocky and uneven, with the lake water visible through the mist. Abandoned wooden buildings gradually emerge on the right side as the character continues along the water's edge.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement through a desolate town that shifts from a claustrophobic residential street to an open, misty shoreline. It begins with the character walking along wet asphalt lined with derelict wooden houses and brick buildings, where dense fog severely limits visibility. As the character moves forward, the urban environment gives way to a rocky and uneven terrain. The scene then expands toward the lakeside, where the water becomes visible through the mist and abandoned wooden structures gradually emerge along the right side of the water's edge.
